files.purpose: Main HTML file, entry point for the React application, contains the root element.
Renders the React application into the DOM, imports App.jsx.
Main application component, orchestrates the Todo app's layout and state.
Global CSS file, imports Tailwind CSS base styles and custom utilities.
Component for adding new tasks, includes an input field and an add button.
Component for displaying the list of tasks, maps over task data and renders TodoItem components.
Component for a single todo item, displays task text, complete checkbox, and delete button.
Custom hook for managing todo state (add, complete, delete) and potentially local storage persistence.
Defines project metadata, scripts, and dependencies.
Tailwind CSS configuration file, for customizing themes, plugins, and purging.
PostCSS configuration, typically used by Tailwind CSS for processing CSS.
Specifies intentionally untracked files to ignore by Git.
